_about: Hand overrides for the 2017+ reworks. track_pick forces the exact rework cut AND forces the row to link the specific 2017+ release (not the pre-2000 master it shares) for original-artist remixes and multi-track releases. video_pick pins the official/Topic upload (all oembed-validated) because most of these Discogs pages carry only the vintage clip of the original. row_note names the pre-2000 source and links its row in the sibling originals playlist.

track_pick.7: The Age Of Love (Solomun Renaissance Remix)
track_pick.10: Brighter Days (MAW Mix - Kai Alce Edit)
track_pick.24: Sing It Back (Todd Edwards Remix / Vocal Edit)
track_pick.28: Toca's Miracle (Vidojean X Oliver Loenn Remix)

video_note.6: official Chaka Khan remix upload (the X5 garage-house 'Remixes' edition)
video_note.10: official audio of Kai Alce's edit of the Masters At Work mix
